---
title: "Editorial for Special Issue: Soft Power and Public Diplomacy in East Asia"
date: 2018-06
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [Scopus, Korea, public diplomacy, 2018]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan</strong> (2018), “Editorial for Special Issue: Soft Power and Public Diplomacy in East Asia,” <em>Journal of Contemporary Eastern Asia</em>: 19(1): 31-42, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.17477/jcea.2018.17.1.001"><code>10.17477/jcea.2018.17.1.001</code></a>
doi: 10.17477/jcea.2018.17.1.001
#image:
#draft: true
---

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_special_2018,
    title = {Special Issue on Soft Power and Public Diplomacy in East Asia},
    volume = {17},
    issn = {2383-9449},
    doi = {10.17477/jcea.2018.17.1.001},
    pages = {1--4},
    number = {1},
    journaltitle = {Journal of Contemporary Eastern Asia},
    author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
    date = {2018},
    note = {Type: Journal Article},
}
```
